name: @ascendvent/ai-handbook
description: Universal AI Engineering Handbook - Open source standards and protocols for AI-assisted development with Claude Code

scripts.validate: npm run test && echo '✅ All components validated'
scripts.dev: echo 'AI Handbook Development Mode - Use for testing agent modifications'
scripts.agent:validate: echo 'Validating agent files...' && find agents/ -name '*.md' -exec echo 'Checking {}' \; -exec head -10 {} \;
scripts.agent:list: echo 'Available Agents:' && ls -1 agents/*.md | sed 's/agents\///g' | sed 's/.md//g'
scripts.docs:serve: echo 'Documentation available at: README.md, docs/, agents/README.md'
scripts.init: cp templates/CLAUDE.template.md ./CLAUDE.md && echo '✅ CLAUDE.md template copied - customize with your project details'
scripts.health: npm run validate && npm run agent:list && echo '✅ AI Handbook package healthy'
scripts.update:changelog: echo 'Remember to update CHANGELOG.md with your changes'
scripts.security:check: npm audit --audit-level=moderate && echo '✅ Security check completed'

author: Ryan McDonald <ryan@ascendvent.com>
